name: Majiosheldon
name_jp: アドバンス・ディボーター
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned, except by its own effect. If this card is Tributed for a Tribute Summon, during your next Standby Phase: You can Special Summon this card from your Graveyard. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck during the turn you activate this effect.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned, except by its own effect. If this card is Tributed for a Tribute Summon, during your next Standby Phase: You can Special Summon this card from your Graveyard. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck during the turn you activate this effect.
eff: Cannot be Special Summoned, except by its own effect. If this card is Tributed for a Tribute Summon, during your next Standby Phase: You can Special Summon this card from your Graveyard. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck during the turn you activate this effect.

summoning: Cannot be Special Summoned except by a specific method
Cannot be Special Summoned from the hand
Cannot be Special Summoned from the Deck
Cannot be Special Summoned from the Spell & Trap Zone
Cannot be Special Summoned while banished
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Prevents the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
